description_long: This is a compact mechanical keyboard with a rectangular, low-profile chassis and a visible USB cable for connectivity. The keycaps are arranged in a grid layout and feature a variety of colors: teal, brown, yellow, orange, and red, creating a visually striking appearance. The keyboard appears to have a 65% layout, omitting the numpad and function row for a more portable form factor. The casing is a solid, dark blue or gray material, likely plastic or metal, with a matte finish. The keycaps are sculpted and made of plastic, with legends printed in a standard Latin script. The cable is detachable and black, with a USB connector visible at one end.
description: A compact, colorful mechanical keyboard with a visible USB cable and a 65% key layout. The keycaps are teal, brown, yellow, orange, and red, set in a dark chassis.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the keyboard, colorful keycaps, and the cable emerging from the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staggered rows of keycaps and the cable coiled to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge, the cable, and the tops of the keycaps in their color arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the teal keycaps in the foreground and the cable extending to the left.
